reason: This is a high-quality sample with a coherent task blueprint that progresses logically from project exploration to file discovery to content search. The synthetic user behaves naturally as a curious newcomer, asking realistic follow-up questions without using tool jargon. The assistant uses tools appropriately (tree, glob, grep), stays grounded in visible tool outputs, and provides accurate explanations of the code found. The trajectory fully reflects all three blueprint goals, and the end condition is clearly satisfied. No hallucinations or contradictions are present - the assistant's summaries of the code match exactly what the grep tool returned.
